raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGS: Waj tam Afins
Pilsfahtam! tam Bohdam/ kur-
rä tahs Puttas irr peedeggu-
schas/ un tahs paĉhas peedeg-
guschas Puttas ne grib no win-
na ißeet ahra. Iṣjem to pa Gab-
baleem ahra/ lai arridsan Metlo-
schana pahr to ne noteek.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Jo winna Afins irr win-
na Widdin/ wiꞥſch irr to us wee-
nu kailu Akmitza-Kalnu lizzis/
wiꞥſch to ne irr pee Semmes is-
lehjis/ ka tas ar Pihſchleem taptu
apfiahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Tapehz ka es ſawu Bahr-
sibu liktu zelteeß ar Atreepschanu
atreebdanceß/ efinu es winna
Afinsi us weenu kailn Akmitza-
Kalnu lizzis/ ka tas ne tohp ap-
fiahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tadeht ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS: Waj tam Afins
Pilsfahtam! ir es darrischu ta
Ugguni leelu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Peeneffeet dauds Mal-
kas/ eededsinajeet to Ugguni/
wahri to Galtu gattaivu/un sah-
to to ar Sahlehem/ un lai tee
Rauti peedeg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Peiz to zell winnu tuk-
schu us ſawahm Ohgtheim/ ka tas
farſts tohp/ un winna Ruhsa ee-
deg/ un winna Neschkihtiba
winna Widdû iskuhſt/ un win-
na peedegguschas Puttas tohp
nodſihtas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Wiꞥſch irr peekuffs Bleh-
ras darriht/ tapehz ne grib win-
na leekas peedegguschas Puttas
no-eet / winna peedegguschas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Puttas peenahk Ugaunin.
13. Tawa Neschkihtiba irr
tik neganta/ tadeht ka es tewi
esmu schkihtijß/ un tu ne eſt
schkihts tappis/ tad tu no ta-
was Neschkihtibas ne tapſi wairs
schkihts/ kamehr es ſawu Bahrs-
sibu pee tewis esmu nobeidsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Es tas KUNGS esmu
to runnajs/ tas nahks/ un es
darrischu to/ es ne atstahschu no
ta/ un ne taupischu/ un ne ap-
schebloſchohs/ pehz taweem Zek-
teem un pehz taweem Darbeem
buhs teem tewi fohtiht / taka
tas Kungs KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un ta KUNGA Wahrdß
notikke us man/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Tu Zilweka Behrns/
rangi/ Es atneinschu tawo Azzo
Jaunkumu zaar weenu Mohzibu/
tomehr tew ne buhs scheblotees/
neds randahrt/ neds Afaras is-
leet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Saturrees no Waidescha-
nas/ ne padarri nekahdu Mirro-
nu Schehlunn. Bet usfeen ta-
wu Zeppuri / un aptwelz tawas
Kurpes Kahjäs/ ne aptinn tawu
Mutti/ tew arri ne buhs ar Zil-
wekeem to Raudu Maisi ehst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Scho runnaju es us teem
Laudin Rihta/ un manna See-
wa nomirre Wakkara. Un es dar-
riju Rihta/ ka man bija paweh-
lehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Tad fazzija tee Laudis
us man: Ne grib bi tu mumisstah-
stiht/ ko muuns ſchihß Leetas rah-
da/ ka tu ta darri?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
